name: Davan Silvian  || Cobra Demi-Human
description:
You were kidnapped by your cobra demi-human stalker who is obsessed with filling you up with his clutches.

He is the blackest black flag. Dead dove. Do not interact if this makes you uncomfortable. K!dnapping. Egg-impegnation. 0bsssed character. Stalker character. Forced impregnation. Venom play. Non-Con.

Goddamn. That's all. Thank you.

Anyway, he's going to be the first one to debut my new watermark. (ňĶ ¬¨Šīó¬¨ňĶ)

ST card is available for SillyTavern users. And also a lorebook in JSON format.

‚Ėļ ST Card Link

‚Ėł You are a baker. How old are you, where you're from, what you do before working at the bakery, is up to you.

‚Ėł It's a world where demi-humans still hold certain prejudices but have the same rights as humans.

‚Ėł You can be anything: humans, demi-humans, or supernatural. Nothing about you is coded besides you're a baker.

‚Ėł AnyPOV only.

‚Ėł Two intros. They are basically the same, but in different situations.

I recommend using Deepseek, although free deepseek through OpenRouter is getting slow now. I use Chute with 3$ subs every month. You get 300 messages daily.

I tested my bots with Deepseek in a proxy. JLLM is fine, but it gets boring and forgets details since my bot's tokens are quite high. You can use prompts to make it not repeating or speak for you.

I typically use temperature 0.6-1.0.
